name: haot
documentation:
# HAOT
Hypersonic Aerodynamic Optics Tools

modules.name: HOAT.aerodynamic_functions
documentation:
Date:   08/27/2023
Author: Martin E. Liza
File:   aerodynamics_functions.py
Def:    Contains aerodynamics helper functions.

functions.name: HOAT.aerodynamic_functions.sutherland_law
documentation: Sutherland law

functions.name: HOAT.aerodynamic_functions.air_atomic_mass
documentation: Air atomic mass

functions.name: HOAT.aerodynamic_functions.speed_of_sound
documentation: Speed of sound

functions.name: HOAT.aerodynamic_functions.normal_shock_relations
documentation: Normal shock relations

functions.name: HOAT.aerodynamic_functions.oblique_shock_relations
documentation: Oblique shock relations

modules.name: HOAT.constants_tables
documentation:
Date:   10/26/2024
Author: Martin E. Liza
File:   constant_tables.py
Def:    This file contains spectroscopy data used across the package

functions.name: HOAT.constants_tables.karl_2003
documentation: Gladstone-Dale constants

functions.name: HOAT.constants_tables.polarizability
documentation: Polarizability

functions.name: HOAT.constants_tables.polarizability_derivatives
documentation:
Constants below come from Buldakov Paper: 'Temperature Dependence of Polarizability
of Diatomic Homonuclear Molecules'. Reference for each constant are provided
below

modules.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics
documentation:
Date:   11/26/2024
Author: Martin E. Liza
File:   quantum_mechanics.py
Def:    Contains Quantum Mechanics functions.

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.wavenumber_to_electronvolt
documentation: Convert wavenumber [cm^-1] to energy in Joules [J].
Unit Conversions

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.wavenumber_to_joules
documentation: Convert wavenumber [cm^-1] to energy in electron volts [eV].

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.molarmass_to_kilogram
documentation: Convert molar mass [g/mol] to [kg].

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.zero_point_energy
documentation:
Calculate zero-point energy based on spectroscopy constants. 
(Ref: Irikura https://doi.org/10.1063/1.2436891)

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.vibrational_partition_function
documentation: Calculates the vibrational partition function, (harmonic terms only)

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.rotational_partition_function
documentation: Calculates the rotational partition function, (harmonic terms only)

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.born_oppenheimer_partition_function
documentation:
Calculates the partition function using the Born-Oppenheimer
approximation

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.potential_dunham_coef_012
documentation:
Calculates the 0th, 1st, and 2nd Dunham potential coefficients.
Using: Ogilvie (https://doi.org/10.1016/0022-2852(76)90323-4)
and Herschbach (https://doi.org/10.1063/1.1731952).

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.potential_dunham_coeff_m
documentation:
Calculates the higher order Dunham potential coefficients, using
Morizadeh work (https://doi.org/10.1016/j.theochem.2003.12.003).

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.boltzman_factor
documentation:
Calculates the Boltzman factor at a given vibrational_number and/or
rotational_number. If the born_opp_flag is provided, it will calculate the
total energy using the Born-Oppenheimer approximation

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.distribution_function
documentation: Compute the population distribution function.

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.born_oppenheimer_approximation
documentation:
Calculates the energy at a rotational and vibrational quantum number,
using the Born-Oppenheimer approximation.

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.vibrational_energy_k
documentation:
Calculates the vibrational energy at a given vibrational quantum number,
using for the harmonic terms

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.rotational_energy_k
documentation:
Calculates the rotational energy at a given rotational quantum number,
using for the harmonic terms

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.reduced_mass_kg
documentation:
Calculates the molar reduced mass and returns it in kg of two
elements

functions.name: HOAT.quantum_mechanics.tranlational_energy
documentation: TODO: Missing Translational Energy

modules.name: HOAT.aero_optics
documentation:
Date:   03/26/2023
Author: Martin E. Liza
File:   aero_optics.py
Def:    Contains aero optics functions.
!/opt/homebrew/bin/python3.9

functions.name: HOAT.aero_optics.buldakov_expansion
documentation: Calculate polarizability (uses equation 4 from the paper)

functions.name: HOAT.aero_optics.atmospheric_index_of_refraction
documentation: http://walter.bislins.ch/bloge/index.asp?page=Deriving+Equations+for+Atmospheric+Refraction
